<!-- indicator: fig-pc-help-improve-hlth -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-pc-help-improve-hlth
#| fig-cap: 'Most Helpful to Improve Health in Populations Served, Putnam County (n = 128)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Most Helpful to Improve Health in Populations Served, Putnam County (n = 128).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-pc-help-improve-hlth", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
